# Implementation Plan: Terminal Cancellation Feature

## 1. Executive Summary
The Terminal Cancellation Feature aims to provide users with a robust, intuitive, and reliable mechanism to terminate long-running processes, asynchronous tasks, or hung operations within a terminal interface. This involves implementing a multi-layered signal handling system that can gracefully shut down resources without leaving the system in an inconsistent state.
